name: copilot-reviewer-assistant
description: GitHub Copilot review suggestions don't always come with an 'Apply' button. This extension fills that gap — fetch every pending Copilot review comment and apply all fixes automatically, straight from VS Code.

commands.title: Copilot Reviewer: Open PR Copilot Reviews Panel
Copilot Reviewer: Clear Stored GitHub Authentication

copilotReviewer.additionalBotLogins.description: Additional GitHub login names to treat as trusted Copilot bot accounts (explicit allowlist only — no patterns).

copilotReviewer.preFillFromClipboard.description: When true, automatically reads the clipboard to pre-fill the PR URL input box if a GitHub PR URL is detected.

enumDescriptions: Show open PRs you authored or are assigned to (default).
Show only open PRs you created.
Show only open PRs you are assigned to.
copilotReviewer.prFilter.description: Controls which open pull requests are shown in the PR picker. Only PRs matching the filter AND having open Copilot review comments are displayed.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
